  • Classes in org.apache.axis2.builder used by org.apache.axis2.builder
    Class
    Description
    Builder
    Message builder able to convert a byte stream into a SOAP infoset.
    MIMEAwareBuilder
    Extension interface for Builder implementations that can build a message from a MIME multipart message.
